## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature altering existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] My commits follow the commit message conventions
- [ ] I have added or updated tests as needed
- [ ] All existing tests pass: `make test`
- [ ] Race condition check passes: `make test-race`
- [ ] Lint passes: `make lint`
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed
- [ ] This change does not introduce new TODOs or commented-out code
